channel.title: CNAPP on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in CNAPP on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: CNAPP evolution: How Microsoft aligns with leading cloud risk management platforms
item.description:
Microsoft’s post says CNAPP platforms are increasingly used to prioritize exploitable risks, reduce exposure, and embed security across the application lifecycle. It positions Microsoft’s approach as aligned with other leading cloud risk management platforms.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
